untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ranking stocks by one-day prior returns percentiles (bottom and top) across a universe. The engine uses single-stock conditions, not cross-sectional ranking. Exact percentile thresholds are AUTHOR_SILENT. Conditions above use approximate return thresholds as a proxy.
translation_notes: This is a cross-sectional mean-reversion strategy that requires universe-level ranking. Translated to use returns indicator as proxy: long when returns are negative (worst performers), short when returns are positive (best performers). True implementation requires portfolio construction logic beyond single-stock rule conditions. Exit conditions are reversal-based (opposite signal) since AUTHOR_SILENT.
